pages.illustrationAlt: Text-free illustration for Fennel’s Lantern Lane, page 1

readAloudText.Wonder: Fennel Fox lights the first tiny lantern on Lantern Lane.
readAloudText.Explore: Fennel Fox touched the first lantern with a warm little spark. The lane glowed honey-gold under the evening trees.

pages.illustrationAlt: Text-free illustration for Fennel’s Lantern Lane, page 2

readAloudText.Wonder: Roo Mouse arrives with a basket of lantern seeds.
readAloudText.Explore: Roo Mouse carried a basket almost bigger than himself. Inside were lantern seeds, round and sleepy, waiting for their places.

pages.illustrationAlt: Text-free illustration for Fennel’s Lantern Lane, page 3

readAloudText.Wonder: Opal Owl notices one dark bend where no lantern has grown.
readAloudText.Explore: Opal Owl blinked slowly from a branch. “There is one bend still dark,” she said, kindly but clearly.

pages.illustrationAlt: Text-free illustration for Fennel’s Lantern Lane, page 4

readAloudText.Wonder: Fennel wants to run ahead, but Roo asks to walk slowly together.
readAloudText.Explore: Fennel’s paws bounced with hurry. Roo held up one small hand. “Can we go together?” Fennel took a slower breath.

pages.illustrationAlt: Text-free illustration for Fennel’s Lantern Lane, page 5

readAloudText.Wonder: They plant the first lantern seed beside a mushroom step.
readAloudText.Explore: Roo tucked one seed into soft dirt beside a mushroom step. Fennel patted the soil as gently as a blanket.

pages.illustrationAlt: Text-free illustration for Fennel’s Lantern Lane, page 6

readAloudText.Wonder: Opal hums a low note, and the seed glows under the earth.
readAloudText.Explore: Opal hummed hoo-oo, low and warm. Under the dirt, a tiny glow answered.

pages.illustrationAlt: Text-free illustration for Fennel’s Lantern Lane, page 7

readAloudText.Wonder: A small lantern sprout opens, making Roo clap quietly.
readAloudText.Explore: A sprout curled up from the soil. At its tip, one lantern bud opened like a sleepy eye.

pages.illustrationAlt: Text-free illustration for Fennel’s Lantern Lane, page 8

readAloudText.Wonder: At the windy bend, Fennel shields the lantern seed with his tail.
readAloudText.Explore: The wind went whoo. Fennel wrapped his fluffy tail around the seed place until the gust passed by.

pages.illustrationAlt: Text-free illustration for Fennel’s Lantern Lane, page 9

readAloudText.Wonder: Roo drops a seed and worries, but Opal spots it shining under a leaf.
readAloudText.Explore: Roo’s basket tipped. One seed rolled away. His whiskers trembled until Opal pointed to a tiny shine beneath a leaf.

pages.illustrationAlt: Text-free illustration for Fennel’s Lantern Lane, page 10

readAloudText.Wonder: They laugh softly and plant the found seed at the bend.
readAloudText.Explore: Roo picked up the seed. Fennel smiled. Opal blinked. Together they planted it exactly where the lane needed a little courage.

pages.illustrationAlt: Text-free illustration for Fennel’s Lantern Lane, page 11

readAloudText.Wonder: Lanterns glow one by one, showing a path that feels friendly.
readAloudText.Explore: One lantern, then another, then another. The dark bend became a soft path of little warm hellos.

pages.illustrationAlt: Text-free illustration for Fennel’s Lantern Lane, page 12

readAloudText.Wonder: Fennel admits he hurried because the dark bend made him nervous.
readAloudText.Explore: Fennel looked at his paws. “I hurried because I did not want to feel nervous,” he said. Roo leaned close.

pages.illustrationAlt: Text-free illustration for Fennel’s Lantern Lane, page 13

readAloudText.Wonder: Roo says small lights work better when friends plant them together.
readAloudText.Explore: Roo touched the basket. “Small lights are braver together,” he said. Opal nodded from above.

pages.illustrationAlt: Text-free illustration for Fennel’s Lantern Lane, page 14

readAloudText.Wonder: The three friends sit at the bend and watch moths dance in the lantern glow.
readAloudText.Explore: They sat where the lane used to look dark. Moths danced in the lantern light, slow as floating petals.

pages.illustrationAlt: Text-free illustration for Fennel’s Lantern Lane, page 15

readAloudText.Wonder: Lantern Lane shines softly all the way home.
readAloudText.Explore: When it was time to go, the lane shone from first step to last. Fennel, Roo, and Opal followed it home without hurry.
